mnemonics: CRAVE Optimization: C - Constraints, R - Resources, A - Algorithm Selection, V - Variables, E - Evaluation Metrics
keyPoints: Understand the problem constraints and objective function thoroughly
Select appropriate optimization algorithms based on problem characteristics
Implement proper stopping criteria and convergence checks
commonMistakes: Using wrong optimization techniques for problem type (e.g., using linear programming for non-linear problems)
Ignoring constraint handling leading to infeasible solutions
Poor parameter tuning causing slow convergence or suboptimal results
